bridge_rationales: CWE-502: Deserialization of untrusted data — pickle attacks on model weights, joblib/numpy artifacts; harden via safetensors, isolate load context. (conf 0.85; src https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/502.html)

CWE-502: Deserialization of untrusted data — pickle attacks on model weights, joblib/numpy artifacts; harden via safetensors, isolate load context. (conf 0.85; src https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/502.html);CWE-918: SSRF — inference servers and agents that fetch arbitrary URLs (RAG, tool-use); harden URL allowlists, isolate egress. (conf 0.80; src https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/918.html)

CWE-400: Resource exhaustion — denial-of-wallet on LLM inference (long contexts, ReDoS, recursive prompt loops); harden quotas, detect anomalous spend. (conf 0.75; src https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/400.html)

CWE-400: Resource exhaustion — denial-of-wallet on LLM inference (long contexts, ReDoS, recursive prompt loops); harden quotas, detect anomalous spend. (conf 0.75; src https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/400.html)
CWE-78: OS command injection — common in agent shell tools; harden argv construction, isolate via sandboxes/jails. (conf 0.85; src https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/78.html)
CWE-918: SSRF — inference servers and agents that fetch arbitrary URLs (RAG, tool-use); harden URL allowlists, isolate egress. (conf 0.80; src https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/918.html)
CWE-89: SQL injection via LLM-generated queries or NL2SQL pipelines; harden parameterization, detect anomalous queries. (conf 0.75; src https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/89.html)

CWE-79: XSS in AI-app frontends (chat UIs, dashboards) and rendered LLM output; harden output encoding, detect script-injection patterns. (conf 0.70; src https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/79.html)

CWE-770: Allocation without limits — concurrent inference requests, batch sizes, context lengths; harden quotas, detect spike patterns. (conf 0.75; src https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/770.html)
CWE-94: Code injection via LLM-generated code execution and prompt injection; harden code-eval boundaries, isolate execution context. (conf 0.85; src https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/94.html)
CWE-862: Missing authorization on critical functions; isolate function-level access, harden default-deny. (conf 0.75; src https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/862.html)

CWE-20: Input validation gaps reach AI systems via untrusted prompts, tool args, and ingestion pipelines; harden boundary checks, detect malformed inputs at runtime. (conf 0.55; src https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/20.html)

CWE-22: Path traversal in model-loading or RAG-document paths can read arbitrary files; harden path normalization, isolate the filesystem view. (conf 0.70; src https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/22.html)
